title: Two charging stations share a tight load-management limit
description: Both stations ask for 10 kW (20 kW total) but the grid limit is 12 kW. The energy manager shares the budget proportionally (ratio 0.6), so each station is allocated 6 kW and total import holds at the 12 kW limit — neither station is starved. No PV/house/weather, so it is fully deterministic under `dale dev --stepped`.

steps.label: Run several manager allocation cycles (30 s of virtual time)
Station 1 is throttled to its 6 kW share
Station 2 gets the same 6 kW share
Total import holds at the 12 kW limit

judge.text: Equal requests get an equal proportional share — neither station is starved while the other runs full.
